title: platostoma menthoides var. longiracemosum
intro:
Platostoma menthoides var. longiracemosum, also known as the long-racemed Platostoma, is a variant of the Platostoma menthoides plant species, which belongs to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and is native to tropical Africa.

This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties. The longiracemosum variant is particularly prized for its potential health benefits, including the ability to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and soothe digestive problems. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in traditional medicine in various forms, including dried leaves and essential oils.
